'''tawana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whalehood|whalehood]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whalehood|whalehood]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tawana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæwænæth|tæwænæth]] || [[word:tæwænæj|tæwænæj]] || [[word:tæwænæsh|tæwænæsh]] || [[word:tæwænæ|tæwænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tawawanath|tawawanath]] || [[word:tawawanaj|tawawanaj]] || [[word:tawawanash|tawawanash]] || [[word:tawawana|tawawana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tawanath|tawanath]] || [[word:tawanaj|tawanaj]] || [[word:tawanash|tawanash]] || [[word:tawana|tawana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tawafnath|tawafnath]] || [[word:tawafnaj|tawafnaj]] || [[word:tawafnash|tawafnash]] || [[word:tawafnaf|tawafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tawanatha|tawanatha]] || [[word:tawanaja|tawanaja]] || [[word:tawanasha|tawanasha]] || [[word:tawanaka|tawanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tawanath|tawanath]] || [[word:tawanaj|tawanaj]] || [[word:tawanash|tawanash]] || [[word:tawana|tawana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tawanathal|tawanathal]] || [[word:tawanajal|tawanajal]] || [[word:tawanashal|tawanashal]] || [[word:tawanakal|tawanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tawanathatha|tawanathatha]] || [[word:tawanajaja|tawanajaja]] || [[word:tawanashasha|tawanashasha]] || [[word:tawanaka|tawanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tawanathan|tawanathan]] || [[word:tawanajan|tawanajan]] || [[word:tawanashan|tawanashan]] || [[word:tawanakan|tawanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tawanathaoro|tawanathaoro]] || [[word:tawanajaoro|tawanajaoro]] || [[word:tawanashaoro|tawanashaoro]] || [[word:tawanakaoro|tawanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
